mapper.select: select t.id,t.normalized_key,t.version,tt.locale,tt.name from portfolio.tag t left join portfolio.tag_translation tt on tt.tag_id=t.id order by t.normalized_key,t.id,tt.locale
select s.id,s.normalized_key,s.version,st.locale,st.name from portfolio.skill s left join portfolio.skill_translation st on st.skill_id=s.id order by s.normalized_key,s.id,st.locale
select id,normalized_key,version from portfolio.tag where id=#{id} for no key update
select id,normalized_key,version from portfolio.skill where id=#{id} for no key update
select p.id from portfolio.project_tag pt join portfolio.project p on p.id=pt.project_id where pt.tag_id=#{id} order by p.id for update of p
select p.id from portfolio.project_skill ps join portfolio.project p on p.id=ps.project_id where ps.skill_id=#{id} order by p.id for update of p
